name: Peachy Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and brown sugar. Stir in candied fruit, raisins, dates, and walnuts.
2. Add sweetened condensed milk, mincemeat, peaches, and apricot nectar.
3. Combine well. Pour into 2 greased and floured 9 x 5 inch loaf pans.
